economic_ownership_map.label: Legacy marketed products

low.label: Legacy MS and biosimilar product revenue
Normalized after-tax owner margin on legacy portfolio
low.rationale: Base anchored to FY2025 product mix with MS erosion and biosimilar pressure; low uses faster TECFIDERA/TYSABRI cliff; high assumes stable rare-disease MS share.

low.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash multiple
low.rationale: Patent-cliff duration shortens effective life; multiple reflects declining annuity not perpetual growth.

base.label: Legacy MS and biosimilar product revenue
Normalized after-tax owner margin on legacy portfolio
base.rationale: Base anchored to FY2025 product mix with MS erosion and biosimilar pressure; low uses faster TECFIDERA/TYSABRI cliff; high assumes stable rare-disease MS share.

base.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash multiple
base.rationale: Patent-cliff duration shortens effective life; multiple reflects declining annuity not perpetual growth.

high.label: Legacy MS and biosimilar product revenue
Normalized after-tax owner margin on legacy portfolio
high.rationale: Base anchored to FY2025 product mix with MS erosion and biosimilar pressure; low uses faster TECFIDERA/TYSABRI cliff; high assumes stable rare-disease MS share.

high.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash multiple
high.rationale: Patent-cliff duration shortens effective life; multiple reflects declining annuity not perpetual growth.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 product disclosures; product-level patent and erosion schedules pending.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: After-tax product cash flow net of erosion, rebates, sustaining commercial cost, and patent loss.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

low.label: Probability-weighted pipeline success value

low.rationale: Deducts disclosed Phase 3 spend and launch prep not already in product DCFs.

base.rationale: Aggregate of litifilimab, felzartamab, high-dose nusinersen and other Phase 2/3 branches; base uses reference-class probabilities pending indication-level trees.

base.rationale: Deducts disclosed Phase 3 spend and launch prep not already in product DCFs.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

method_route.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets
failure_modes: pipeline value counted in both revenue forecast and option schedule
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Research pipeline
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Each indication must have non-overlapping technical/regulatory probabilities, timing, remaining R&D, launch cost, and failure value.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Risked product cash flows with explicit penetration, duration, pricing, and commercial reinvestment.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: After-tax product cash flow net of erosion, rebates, sustaining commercial cost, and patent loss.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Value acquired assets independently of purchase price, then deduct all acquisition financing and contingent consideration.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Explicit reserve for correlated downside not captured by independent product and pipeline ranges.

blockers: closing_claims: Reconcile the acquisition closing balance sheet, borrowings, CVRs, integration costs, cash burn, and correlated downside.
pipeline_event_trees: Build indication-level, non-overlapping probability trees using clinical base rates, milestones, timing, remaining R&D, and launch capital.
product_cash_flows: Build product-level revenue, patent, rebate, margin, tax, and commercial reinvestment schedules.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Legacy products, growth products, pipeline probabilities, patent duration, cash, debt, and dilution.
